reviews.title: A waste of money if you stay at this hotel
reviews.text:
This hotel is rated as 4 stars, and belongs to the top of the largest hotels in Rach Gia city. However, what I got here was not worth the price I paid, even extremely bad:
- The attitude of the reception was extremely unfriendly and unprofessional, perhaps because we checked in late (after 9 pm) they were annoyed. There are many small details with the staff of this hotel that annoy me, I think they are all not worthy of the 4-star standard of a hotel
- The room is old and the furniture in the room is not clean
- My room didn't have hot water for the shower, I called the reception and got the answer to turn the shower on hot water, they think I'm stupid enough to not be aware of this problem? After enduring the cold for a shower, I called them up to confirm the problem and indeed the water heater in that room was not working.
- The air conditioner didn't work, same with the hot water tank

And after all, the next day, I really wanted to meet the manager of this hotel to clarify my problems but the staff member said he wasn't there and only came late in the afternoon when I left there. I do not believe that such an irresponsible and unprofessional way of working can make this hotel good.

reviews.title: Uncomfortable beds
reviews.positives: Close to family
reviews.negatives: Sheets scratchy. AC did not work. No rooms close to our kids and we had to upgrade to get adjacent rooms

reviews.title: Hotel quá tệ luôn

If they can fix then will be perfect.

reviews.title: The hotel provides a room with a damaged floor to the guest.
reviews.text: The receptionist discriminates against guests who book through Agoda, so they receive damaged rooms anyway.

reviews.title: Un hotel clásico
reviews.positives: El tamaño de habitación y la vista bien.
reviews.negatives: Desayuno no tiene mucha variedad, más vietnamita que occidental.

reviews.title: The hotel is affiliated with Agoda but still gives guests broken rooms.
reviews.text: The room on the third floor has a damaged floor, but the staff said that because I booked the room on Agoda for just one night, they don't need to change the room for the guest. It is unacceptable to sell a room with damaged facilities. I cannot accept the attitude of the staff's explanation.

reviews.title: A éviter absolument!
reviews.negatives:
Cet hôtel est une arnaque, n'y allez pas:
- Il n'y avait pas d'eau chaude.
- Au check-out, apparemment il manquait 2 serviettes pour les mains et ils ont fait tout un cinéma. On a dû remplir et signer un formulaire en vietnamien pour déclarer la disparition des 2 serviettes et déclarer que nous ne les avions pas par écrit alors que nous étions pressés et de toute évidence n'avions pas volé 2 serviettes pour les mains...
- La plupart du personnel ne parlait pas anglais.

A éviter absolument!

reviews.title: To be fair we only travelled through
reviews.text: The hotel does its very best to be top of the range, and probably for the city of Rach Gia, they are. That is everything said. They run a strong aroma that makes most senses want to jump from a balcony.. it takes some days to get used to.. probably barrable by the time you leave. The lobby is impressive but on closer look, marble wallpaper just looks very kitsch. They must seriously consider double glazing their facade. Our room was at the end of a corridor, next to the outer facade of the building on the 4th floor. Our daughter (toddler) likes to run

De plus, le restaurant de l'hôtel est fermé le soir et pas de restaurants à l'horizon..  nous sommes allés acheter des nouilles instantanées dans un supermarché pour les faire bouillir dans notre chambre.

reviews.title: Ich bin hier das vierte Mal. Die drei Male vorher war Ich sehr zufrieden. Diesmal  jedoch merkt man, dass das Hotel in d
reviews.positives: Die Lage des Hotels ist super! Personal ist sehr freundlich.
reviews.negatives: Der Frühstücksbereich wurde nach außen verlegt. Sieht jetzt eher für mich wie ein Local Schnell Imbiss aus mit wenig Auswahl und alles etwas chaotischer als die Jahre davor als das Frühstück im Restaurant noch aufgebaut war,da hatte man seine Ruhe und einen klimatisierten Bereich.

reviews.title: Underwhelming
reviews.text:
I stayed in this hotel for four nights in December 2022. That is a decision I came to regret since the very first day. I’m not sure where to start: beds were thoroughly uncomfortable to the point where I could not get a whole night’s sleep for 3 nights during my stay. 

Breakfasts were very average, coffee tepid and cold to the point where I decided to eat outside instead after my first day. During breakfast I asked one of the staff to make me an omelette and his response was a particularly aggressive:  “What??” 😢

Other small details which made our stay one to forget: phone not working (fixed later), safe not working (apparently batteries were flat), pillows were mouldered which aggravated my allergies.

Considering I paid full rates (I initially booked two rooms but cancelled one four days prior only to be charged the full amount on check-in) I was thoroughly underwhelmed and would not stay at Saigon Rach Gia again.

reviews.title: Ich würde es nicht unbedingt ein 2.Mal buchen
reviews.positives: Zimmer sind grosszügig, Personal freundlich
reviews.negatives:
Frühstück nur bis 9.30 Uhr - schon bessere Frühstücksauswahl in Vietnam als in diesem Hotel gesehen - bis zum Meer und Hafen Fußmarsch über 1/2 Stunde - der Reisepass musste während des gesamten Aufenthalts hinterlegt werden - als wir ihn  wegen Ausflug mitnehmen wollten, mussten wir den Personalausweis als Pfand hinterlegen, damit wir den Reisepass für die Fähre bekommen.
Im Fitnessraum stand Wasser - als ich rein wollte, kam jemand um es zu beseitigen.

reviews.title: Could be better
reviews.text: The stay could have been better. It is not the cleanest hotel a bit dirty. Also the hotel is quite hot with hallway and lobby not air conditioned and sometimes no lights on in the hallway which is quite not secure. The breakfast options were quite small and could use a revamp. There were people smoking all over the hotel even in the restaurant at breakfast, this should be banned at it disrupts the comfort of other guests. The staff should be trained to advise people not to smoke in the hotel.

reviews.title: Acceptable but needs improvements
reviews.text: The rooms were clean and tidy. Wanted to use the pool facility but it was used as a swimming school for most of the day. Had about 30 kids in the pool at one time during the early evening while we stayed there. I noticed the hotel were probably more than half empty as we didn't see much guests in they hotel lobby or around the hotel. Our flight from ho chi Minh city arrived at 0630 am. Wish the front desk would let us check in early and assign us a room instead of making us wait at the outdoor dining restaurant for an hour. No sense in making guests wait for their rooms when they're readily available.

reviews.title: Clean & nice room,
reviews.text: Lobby should have air conditioning, it is ok for local Vietnamese people, however it’s a bit hot for me.

reviews.title: Among high quality hotel in Rach Gia
reviews.text: The hotel located in the main road leading to Rach Gia city center so it is convenient to travel to harbor for Phu Quoc trip, to airport for Ho Chi Minh trip, and to bus station for trips to other parts of Mekong Delta. The check in and check out process is quick. They also allow early check in. The staff is quite friendly but not too hospitable, they often chat with each other while on duty.  The room is spacious and modern, however, it is dark due to lack of light. The bathroom is large and has basic toiletries. Water pressure is strong. Hot and cold water is also available. The pool is average. The breakfast is tasty and contains many cuisine styles.

reviews.title: Mrs
reviews.text:
Great facilities with clean swimming pool, breakfast had great variety  and location was great. 
Staff was friendly but can be better. We were at the swimming pool very day and it was hard to find staff to serve us. It took a long time before we could get served and most time, we had to go get the satff to order our food/ drinks at the swimming pool.
Overall, we enjoyed our stay and hotel was very clean. We would stay again.

reviews.title: Just okay
reviews.text:
Visited some family in Rach Gia after my wedding, and we booked 5 deluxe rooms. Had a mix up with one room where they put me and my new wife in a suite room. We went out to dinner and came back and they said they had to kick us out because the a/c wasn’t working. Finally they admitted the mistake and they called the manager who after a long discussion told us we could stay in the room. He came by the next morning to apologize and all was good. 

The hotel is modern, spacious, and the rooms are fantastic. It’s probably as good as you’re gonna get in Rach Gia. I didn’t see a pool or spa or anything, and the breakfast was sort of okay.  

The price is a little steep but it is what it is. Had a good time and I might come back one day.

reviews.title: Great Hotel with exceptionally helpful and courteous staffs
reviews.text: This is my third or fourth time staying at this hotel but every time I came back I saw huge but positive change at the hotel. Staffs here are very nice and helpful. They would answer your every need immediately and with courteous manners. Their service and care are truly genuine. Rooms were clean and comfortable. However, it would be very helpful if they can keep an eye on the tour groups and guests, especially those from Northern Vietnam.They talked so loud in the hall way, and inside their rooms with doors wide opened no matter at what time of the day or night, be that early morning or late night! If they can do that, then the stay here would be very comfortable well worth the money.

reviews.title: Very good

reviews.title: Comfortable hotel with attentive staff
reviews.text: We had a pleasant two night stay in this comfortable, well located hotel with polite, attentive staff. Our adjoining S Deluxe rooms were good, although lacking in some facilities that western travellers would like such as yukatas and slippers that are big enough as well as an iron and ironing board in the room. A nice swimming pool but no drinks service at the pool. Limited buffet breakfast, although enjoyable enough. Overall, it did the job for our short stay to celebrate a Vietnamese friend’s birthday!

スタッフの対応も部屋も十分満足いくものでした。
仕事で帰りが遅くなったので周辺がどんな感じかは探索できなかったのが残念。

reviews.title: 금액 대비 만족치 않습니다
reviews.text:
1. 우선 카드 결제 신청했는데 고장으로 현금 달라 합니다
2. 페밀리룸을 신청하면서 소개에 욕조가 있다고 써 있었는데 욕조가 없고 특별신청에 욕조가 있는 방을 선택 했지만 각방으로 갈려야하기에 그냥 썼습니다
3.생수는 무료라 봤던것 같은데 따로 받는군요
4.수영장이 2개라 했는데 하나만 사용되더군요.예약시 공지에 넣던지 하셔야..
5.구명조끼도 유료 입니다
6. 조식은 외국인이 먹기에 입맛에 안 맞고 음식 종류도 너무 없습니다

reviews.title: 옛날 고급호텔 느낌? 좋았습니다.
reviews.text:
락자가 좁은지 위치도 그렇게 나쁘지 않았습니다.
다만 아쉬운게 오토바이 렌트 서비스가 없고, 직원들은 정말 정석대로 움직이는 편인거 같아요.
서빙하는 여직원분이랑 서빙하는 남직원분 이렇게 두분 이외에는 
약간 사람을 대하는것이 되게 사무적인 느낌이었습니다.
그 이외에는 가성비 괜찮은 편안한 호텔이었습니다.
다시 락자에 간다면 이 호텔에 묵을 예정입니다.  락자에 이 호텔말고 더 좋은데는 없는거 같네요.

reviews.title: Good location, reason price
reviews.text:
Vị trí thuận tiện ngay trung tâm thành phố Rạch Giá. Tuy nhiên bên ngoài ko có gì nổi bật nhưng phòng óc sạch sẽ, tiện nghi, nhân viên dễ thương, giá phòng ko quá cao so với chất lượng. 
Nhà hàng nấu ăn ngon, phục vụ tốt. Khi biết mình check-out sớm, bạn lễ tân đã đề nghị chuẩn bị sẵn buổi sáng take away :)
Mình sẽ chọn ở đây khi ghé Rạch Giá lần sau.

reviews.title: Vybavení pokojů neodpovídá nabídce Agody ani na Bookingu
reviews.text:
Pokoje jsou vybaveny kvalitním dřevěným nábytkem. V nabídce souhlasí A/C, vysoušeč vlasů, rychlovarná konvice.Hotel nemá pokoje vybavené mikrovlnkou,myčkou nádobí, kuchyňským náčiním ani kuchyňským koutem.Pokoje nemají pračku a sušičku.Pokoj typu S deluxe se od deluxe liší pouze vyšším patrem od 4.výš.Pokoje s 2 oddělenými postelemi jsou větší než s manželskou. Snídaně podávají do 9,30 h, ale v 9 h bylo vše studené. Vzdálenost od centra je opravdu na jízdu taxikem. Je možné zůstat v pokoji do 18 h za 50% ceny. Ostastatní uvedené vybavení je za poplatek, ale MW a kuchyň je asi jen pro restauraci. Vyperou za poplatek do 24 h. Pokoje mají buď sprchový kout nebo vanu. S deluxe má vanu
A/C je centrální, neteče z ní voda. 
Prostředí je v kliné části města

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Ikke mange der forstod og talte engelsk

reviews.title: old old hotel
reviews.text: The hotel itself is quite old, the bed is also old and not bouncing anymore so when we  turned around on the bed, we heard a noice.Also the bedsheet is not as clean as the standard we would normally expect a self-called 4 star hotel.There’re some dirt spots on the bedsheet, so we can’t even rest comfortably. Besides the breakfast is so unpleasant. Definitely not recommend.

reviews.title: 只能說還ok
reviews.text: 附近吃的並不多

reviews.title: The gymnastics broadcast in the early morning was too noisy
reviews.text: This is my third time staying here for three consecutive days. This time the room is close to the main road. The cars and horns are loud and a little noisy. However, this time I stayed here from 5 to 6 in the morning on Sunday and Monday. A very loud broadcast was played for an hour. At first it was like broadcasting gymnastics, then it was like news. On the last day, it started at 4:50am. I really couldn't understand why the broadcast was broadcast so early. It was a bit noisy. I would recommend staying in a room with a window near the swimming pool as it will be quieter.

reviews.title: Don’t Compare with 4-Star Hotels in Big cities
reviews.text:
This place is relatively rural, so don't expect the accommodation to meet the standards of a big city. Although it's a 4-star hotel, the overall decor is somewhat old, indicating its age.
Pros: The staff is friendly and greets you when encountered. The reception and restaurant staff can speak English. The rooms have sufficient air conditioning, and there is a motorcycle rental service available. When I ordered food delivery through Grab and had it delivered to the lobby, the staff helped deliver it to my room.
Cons: The soundproofing of the rooms is not very good; you can hear the noise from the neighboring rooms clearly. Additionally, the hot water for showering in the evening wasn't very hot, but it was slightly hotter during the daytime. There aren't many dining options nearby.

reviews.title: tot
reviews.text: tot

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: The hotel itself is old, the carpets were dirty. One off the bathroom wasn’t drain well, after 1 minutes in the shower, water started to  build up and  you feel like you stand in the dirty water tubs

reviews.title: Overpriced and dated
reviews.text: Agoda app for some reason decided to only book for one person don’t know why was set to 2 so I messaged the hotel even translated into Viet to sort it out.no reply at all ,got there wasn’t a very friendly arrival from the front counter so even when I showed I had been trying to contact them they charged me extra for my partner which kinda pist me off as this place was the most expensive in town..room very dated bathroom was crusty as ..the butt blaster was filthy gross.. just a shower over a bath,went down to the pool and it was filled with school kids like the local kindergarten day out..weird bill gates posters all over the walls..breakfast was average ..at the same time in the restaurant some type of top management having staff meetings proceeding to run down a staff member pretty close to us !!obviously I couldn’t understand but we could work it out was very unprofessional!! Felt pretty sorry for her! Pros/the general staff were friendly and nice,the place was easy to find,the room was spacious,complementary sex chair was a nice touch,the bed was actually one of the best so far so that kinda made up for a bit,aircon worked fine parking below for my bike…there are alot of brand new hotels in the new section of town for a quarter of the price we realised looking around later yet again don’t be deceived by the photos people
